sourcesContent:
export const COMPONENT_DEFINITIONS = [
  {
    type: 'arduino',
    label: 'Arduino Uno R3',
    category: 'Microcontrollers',
    icon: '🎛',
    description: 'ATmega328P 8-bit MCU',
    defaultProps: { program: 'Blink' },
    width: 200,
    height: 130,
    color: '#1d70b8',
    pins: ['5V','3.3V','GND','D0–D13','A0–A5'],
  },
  {
    type: 'led',
    label: 'LED',
    category: 'Basic',
    icon: '💡',
    description: 'Light Emitting Diode',
    defaultProps: { color: '#ef4444', brightness: 80, on: true },
    width: 70,
    height: 110,
    color: '#ef4444',
    pins: ['Anode (+)', 'Cathode (-)'],
  },
  {
    type: 'resistor',
    label: 'Resistor',
    category: 'Basic',
    icon: '⚡',
    description: '4-Band Axial Resistor',
    defaultProps: { band1: 'brown', band2: 'black', band3: 'red', band4: 'gold' },
    width: 100,
    height: 50,
    color: '#d4a84b',
    pins: ['Terminal 1', 'Terminal 2'],
  },
  {
    type: 'pushbutton',
    label: 'Pushbutton',
    category: 'Basic',
    icon: '🔘',
    description: 'Momentary Tactile Switch',
    defaultProps: { pressed: false },
    width: 80,
    height: 80,
    color: '#334155',
    pins: ['1A','1B','2A','2B'],
  },
  {
    type: 'potentiometer',
    label: 'Potentiometer',
    category: 'Basic',
    icon: '🎚',
    description: '10kΩ Rotary Dial',
    defaultProps: { value: 50 },
    width: 90,
    height: 110,
    color: '#1e2d3b',
    pins: ['GND', 'Wiper', 'VCC'],
  },
  {
    type: 'capacitor_ceramic',
    label: 'Ceramic Capacitor',
    category: 'Passive',
    icon: '🔵',
    description: '100nF Non-polarized',
    defaultProps: { voltage: 0 },
    width: 70,
    height: 110,
    color: '#1d4ed8',
    pins: ['Terminal 1', 'Terminal 2'],
  },
  {
    type: 'capacitor_electrolytic',
    label: 'Electrolytic Cap.',
    category: 'Passive',
    icon: '🔷',
    description: '100µF 16V Radial',
    defaultProps: { capacitance: 100, voltage: 0 },
    width: 70,
    height: 120,
    color: '#0f172a',
    pins: ['Anode (+)', 'Cathode (-)'],
  },
  {
    type: 'diode',
    label: 'Diode',
    category: 'Basic',
    icon: '⊃',
    description: '1N4007 Rectifier',
    defaultProps: { inputVoltage: 0 },
    width: 110,
    height: 50,
    color: '#1f2937',
    pins: ['Anode', 'Cathode'],
  },
  {
    type: 'zener',
    label: 'Zener Diode',
    category: 'Basic',
    icon: '⊃z',
    description: 'Glass Voltage Regulator',
    defaultProps: { zenerVoltage: 5.1, inputVoltage: 0 },
    width: 80,
    height: 120,
    color: '#ea580c',
    pins: ['Anode', 'Cathode'],
  },
  {
    type: 'inductor',
    label: 'Inductor',
    category: 'Passive',
    icon: '〰',
    description: 'Toroidal Coil',
    defaultProps: { inductance: 150, frequency: 10000 },
    width: 110,
    height: 60,
    color: '#78350f',
    pins: ['Lead 1', 'Lead 2'],
  },
  {
    type: 'buzzer',
    label: 'Buzzer',
    category: 'Actuators',
    icon: '🔊',
    description: 'Piezoelectric Active Buzzer',
    defaultProps: { frequency: 2300, volume: 60, active: false },
    width: 90,
    height: 110,
    color: '#1f2937',
    pins: ['Positive (+)', 'Negative (-)'],
  },
  {
    type: 'battery',
    label: '9V Battery',
    category: 'Power',
    icon: '🔋',
    description: 'Alkaline PP3 Battery',
    defaultProps: { chargePercent: 100 },
    width: 140,
    height: 80,
    color: '#111827',
    pins: ['Positive (+)', 'Negative (-)'],
  },
  {
    type: 'photoresistor',
    label: 'Photoresistor (LDR)',
    category: 'Sensors',
    icon: '☀',
    description: 'CdS Light Sensor',
    defaultProps: { luxValue: 300 },
    width: 80,
    height: 110,
    color: '#f97316',
    pins: ['Lead 1', 'Lead 2'],
  },
  {
    type: 'ir_sensor',
    label: 'IR Receiver',
    category: 'Sensors',
    icon: '📡',
    description: '38kHz TSOP Demodulator',
    defaultProps: { selectedKey: 'Power' },
    width: 80,
    height: 110,
    color: '#1e293b',
    pins: ['OUT', 'GND', 'VCC'],
  },
  {
    type: 'ultrasonic',
    label: 'Ultrasonic Sensor',
    category: 'Sensors',
    icon: '🔊',
    description: 'PING))) Proximity Module',
    defaultProps: { distanceCm: 85 },
    width: 130,
    height: 80,
    color: '#085265',
    pins: ['GND', '5V', 'SIG'],
  },
  {
    type: 'hcsr04',
    label: 'HC-SR04',
    category: 'Sensors',
    icon: '📻',
    description: '4-Pin Sonar Distance Sensor',
    defaultProps: { distanceCm: 100 },
    width: 130,
    height: 80,
    color: '#1e4e7c',
    pins: ['VCC', 'TRIG', 'ECHO', 'GND'],
  },
];

export const CATEGORY_ORDER = ['Microcontrollers', 'Basic', 'Passive', 'Actuators', 'Power', 'Sensors'];

export const BAND_COLORS = {
  brown: { color: '#78350f', value: 1, multiplier: 10, label: 'Brown (1)' },
  black: { color: '#000000', value: 0, multiplier: 1, label: 'Black (0)' },
  red:    { color: '#ef4444', value: 2, multiplier: 100, label: 'Red (2)' },
  orange: { color: '#f97316', value: 3, multiplier: 1000, label: 'Orange (3)' },
  yellow: { color: '#eab308', value: 4, multiplier: 10000, label: 'Yellow (4)' },
  green:  { color: '#22c55e', value: 5, multiplier: 100000, label: 'Green (5)' },
  blue:   { color: '#3b82f6', value: 6, multiplier: 1000000, label: 'Blue (6)' },
  violet: { color: '#a855f7', value: 7, multiplier: 10000000, label: 'Violet (7)' },
  grey:   { color: '#64748b', value: 8, multiplier: 100000000, label: 'Grey (8)' },
  white:  { color: '#f8fafc', value: 9, multiplier: 1000000000, label: 'White (9)' },
  gold:   { color: '#d97706', value: -1, multiplier: 0.1, tolerance: '±5%', label: 'Gold (5%)' },
  silver: { color: '#94a3b8', value: -1, multiplier: 0.01, tolerance: '±10%', label: 'Silver (10%)' },
};

export const LED_COLORS = [
  { name: 'Red',     hex: '#ef4444', glow: 'rgba(239,68,68,0.7)' },
  { name: 'Green',   hex: '#22c55e', glow: 'rgba(34,197,94,0.7)' },
  { name: 'Blue',    hex: '#3b82f6', glow: 'rgba(59,130,246,0.7)' },
  { name: 'Yellow',  hex: '#eab308', glow: 'rgba(234,179,8,0.7)' },
  { name: 'Orange',  hex: '#f97316', glow: 'rgba(249,115,22,0.7)' },
  { name: 'White',   hex: '#f1f5f9', glow: 'rgba(241,245,249,0.7)' },
  { name: 'Purple',  hex: '#a855f7', glow: 'rgba(168,85,247,0.7)' },
  { name: 'Pink',    hex: '#ec4899', glow: 'rgba(236,72,153,0.7)' },
];
